title: Four years of war in Ukraine: Odesa's complex 'derussification'
subhed: The southern Ukrainian city, long under the influence of Russia and then the Soviet Union due to its access to the Black Sea, is continuing the process of dismantling the pro-Russian narrative and reclaiming the city, much to the chagrin of those who wish to preserve its Russian 'cultural heritage.'

Trump's threat of sending American hospital ship to Greenland revives tension
subhed: Donald Trump's initiative, which came after a crew member from a US submarine was evacuated to Nuuk, has exasperated the Greenlandic and Danish governments.

title: More than 200 inmates launch hunger strike to seek benefits under Venezuela's new amnesty law
subhed: According to human rights organizations, the law passed by Parliament excludes hundreds of cases of people unjustly convicted for defending their social rights or for criticizing those in power. Prisoners are also protesting against their detention conditions.

title: The secrets of neighing are finally revealed
subhed: To produce this unique sound, the horse performs a 'biphonation': It cries out and whistles at the same time.

title: 2030 Alps Games: Around 40 projects remain to be completed as the deadline nears and timelines tighten
subhed: With four years to go before the Winter Olympic and Paralympic Games open in France, and just three and a half years before the expected delivery of construction projects, consultations with developers are ongoing.

subhed: The biopic produced by Timothée Chalamet draws inspiration from the American champion Marty Reisman. But it was his Japanese rival, Hiroji Satoh, who brought the sport into the modern era.

title: The 'impossible' task of counting deaths at sea
subhed: The International Organization for Migration and migrant aid NGOs simultaneously record deaths at sea in the Mediterranean and Atlantic, but often come up with very different figures. Why?

title: Oleksandr Syrsky, commander of the Ukrainian army, to Le Monde: 'Russian army losses have exceeded its recruitment level'
subhed: The Ukrainian commander-in-chief told Le Monde that, despite a 'very difficult' situation on the battlefield, his army continued to resist 'the most powerful army in Europe' and to 'foil' Russian military plans.
